title: 'Mandelson files lay bare frustration' and 'The welfare party'

title: Denmark forms government after months of negotiations
description: The leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party is forming a centre-left coalition minority government, giving her a third term as prime minister.
content:
Months since Denmark's general election, acting prime minister Mette Frederiksen, the leader of the Social Democratic Party, will form a centre-left coalition minority government.
Twelve parties won seats in March's inconclusive election. The Social ... [2271 chars]

title: Four dead and dozens injured in massive Russian strikes on Ukraine
description: Thousands of Kyiv residents ran for shelter following what officials said were ballistic missile strikes on the city centre.
content:
At least five people have been killed and dozens have been injured after Russia launched a major overnight attack on cities across Ukraine.
Four people were killed in Dnipro and 16 were injured. One person was also killed in Kyiv, where at least 29 w... [419 chars]

title: Ebola outbreak: How health workers are treating patients and staying safe in DR Congo
description: There are currently no approved drugs that target Bundibugyo - the species of Ebola responsible for this outbreak.
content: Health workers in the east of the Democratic Republic of Congo are racing against the clock tohelp Ebola patients manage their symptoms, as well as keep themselves safe and prevent the risk of spreading the virus, while the number of cases continues ... [6941 chars]
